name: NDA Example
description: Complete example — every TRUGS-AGENT system applied to drafting a mutual NDA under WA state law

folder_structure.description: NDA example folder contents and relationships

properties.name: NDA
properties.purpose: Complete example demonstrating all 6 TRUGS-AGENT systems on a non-code domain — mutual NDA, WA state

properties.name: README.md
properties.purpose: Human overview — what the NDA example demonstrates, which systems it uses

properties.name: AGENT.md
properties.purpose: Agent instructions — how to navigate this example, what each file shows

properties.name: AAA_nda_draft.md
properties.purpose: 9-phase AAA plan for drafting the NDA — VISION through DEPLOYMENT with TRL specs and audit criteria

properties.name: epic.trug.json
properties.purpose: Project tracker — 3 epics, 13 tasks, 11 BLOCKS dependency edges showing drafting order

properties.name: MEMORY.md
properties.purpose: Memory index — jurisdiction decisions, drafting preferences, statute references

properties.name: web.trug.json
properties.purpose: Research hub — 20 curated NDA resources across templates, guidance, tools, and WA state statutes

properties.name: nda.trug.json
properties.purpose: The NDA as a TRUG graph — 12 clause nodes with DEPENDS_ON and GOVERNS edges showing legal structure

properties.name: EXAMPLE_nda_mutual.md
properties.purpose: The NDA with TRL annotations — each clause has a <trl> block specifying obligations before plain English

properties.name: NDA_mutual_trugs_llc.md
properties.purpose: The finished NDA — clean, signable, no TRL annotations, plain English, ready for use

properties.scope: AAA specs define what the NDA graph must contain
EPIC tracks tasks from the AAA plan
Web research informs the AAA planning phases
Memory records decisions made during AAA planning
